headline: DXCM Secures Health Canada Authorization for Dexcom G7 15 Day CGM
summary: DexCom's G7 15 Day wins Health Canada authorization, offering longer wear, high accuracy and smart features for adults with diabetes.

raw.headline: DXCM Secures Health Canada Authorization for Dexcom G7 15 Day CGM

headline: Cardinal Health (CAH) Stock Looks Overvalued Following Fresh Earnings Beat Hopes
summary: Cardinal Health stock has delivered a very strong 5 year run, yet the current valuation checks lean expensive, which raises the question of how much of that strength is already reflected in the price. The share price has returned about 365.1% over 5 years, which places recent gains in the context of a long period of strong compounding. Recent news highlights growth momentum in higher margin specialty pharmaceuticals and chronic care, while competitive and regulatory pressures remain an...
